title: SEIF Receipt
description: Proof that a tool call / effect happened. Enables at-least-once delivery with idempotent effects + dedup. v0.1 attests with sha256; ML-DSA-65 PQC signing is deferred (NOT_IN_V0_1). Do not promise exactly-once.

idempotency_key.description: unique per (actor, action) in the store

failure_reason.description: required-by-convention when result is FAIL or REJECTED

duplicate_of.description: receipt id of the original when result is SKIPPED_DUPLICATE
